article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.1. Attachment 2 - COB 2026-2030 Financial Plan 2026-01-27.pdf

briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby 2026–2030 Financial Plan with 2.9% Property Tax Increase Up for Approval
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on adopting the 2026–2030 Financial Plan Bylaw, which would set a 2.9% property tax increase plus a 1.9% Growth Infrastructure Investment Levy for 2026, raising total city spending to $1.36 billion and funding major new facilities, public safety, and housing initiatives.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the February 10, 2026 council vote — this will set your 2026 property tax and utility rates.
